name: Wi-Fi / Wireless Network Infiltration
description: Attack tree modelling wireless network attacks including evil twin access points, WPA downgrade, and rogue device implantation for corporate network infiltration
root_objective: Infiltrate corporate network via wireless attack vectors

nodes.title: Infiltrate Network via Wireless Attacks
nodes.description: Gain access to the corporate network by exploiting Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or other wireless protocols

nodes.title: Deploy Evil Twin Access Point
nodes.description: Set up a rogue AP that mimics the legitimate corporate SSID to intercept credentials

nodes.title: Clone Corporate SSID and Captive Portal
nodes.description: Replicate the corporate Wi-Fi name and create a fake captive portal to harvest 802.1X credentials

nodes.title: Force Client Deauthentication
nodes.description: Send deauth frames to force clients to disconnect and reconnect to the evil twin AP

nodes.title: Crack WPA2/WPA3 Authentication
nodes.description: Capture and crack wireless authentication handshakes

nodes.title: Capture PMKID / 4-Way Handshake
nodes.description: Capture WPA2 PMKID or 4-way handshake for offline dictionary/brute-force attack

nodes.title: WPA3 SAE Downgrade Attack
nodes.description: Force WPA3 clients to fall back to WPA2 using protocol downgrade techniques (Dragonblood)

nodes.title: Attack Enterprise 802.1X (WPA-Enterprise)
nodes.description: Exploit WPA-Enterprise authentication to obtain domain credentials or certificates

nodes.title: Rogue RADIUS Server
nodes.description: Set up a rogue RADIUS server behind an evil twin to capture MSCHAPv2 challenge/response pairs

nodes.title: Relay EAP Authentication
nodes.description: Relay captured 802.1X authentication to the real RADIUS server to gain network access

nodes.title: Plant Physical Rogue Device
nodes.description: Install a hidden wireless device inside the target facility for persistent remote access

nodes.title: Install Raspberry Pi Drop Box
nodes.description: Hide a small device connected to an ethernet port that creates a reverse SSH tunnel for remote access

nodes.title: Deploy 4G/LTE Exfil Device
nodes.description: Plant a device with cellular connectivity that bridges the internal network to an external C2 channel
